objective: Extend the existing /admin/load-test HTTP dashboard with backend runtime and DB pressure visibility plus step/soak/spike load pattern modeling, without introducing SignalR, k8s, NBomber, C# Worker simulators, Redis backplane, HPA, or pod restart observability.
changed: Added typed step/soak/spike load patterns and thresholds in src/lib/load-test-dashboard.ts
Added runtime diagnostics payload validation and current/peak/delta summaries
Added backend runtime metrics panel and diagnostics polling in src/components/admin/LoadTestDashboard.tsx
Expanded Vitest, Playwright, and backend integration tests
notChanged: No HPA or pod restart observability

validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3002 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build frontend nginx

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/admin-load-test-dashboard.spec.ts --workers=1

validations.details: 402 passed, 1 skipped; existing NU1901 AWSSDK.Core warnings

risks: DB timeout count is process-local and only increments for timeout-like diagnostics probe failures
PostgreSQL connection counts are available only for Npgsql relational connections
Soak and spike are modeled within the current HTTP request runner and are not persistent-connection simulations
recommendation: Accept for current scope; consider persistent run-summary export as a follow-up.
